name: Community Athletic Center - Fennville
description: Community Athletic Center - Fennville is a place to play pickleball in Fennville, MI. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.

name: Plainwell
description: Plainwell is a place to play pickleball in Plainwell, MI. There are 5 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Sandy Pines
description: Sandy Pines is a place to play pickleball in Dorr, MI. There are 7 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, food, and water.
fees: Members only — Available only to members, guests, and campers.

name: Schultz Park
description: Come play pickleball at Schultz Park in Douglas, MI! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts cannot be reserved. The courts are free.

name: St. Margaret School GYm
description: St. Margaret School GYm is a place to play pickleball in Otsego, MI. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: The Rock-YFC
description: Come play pickleball at The Rock-YFC in Plainwell, MI! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.

name: Village Square Park
description: Come play pickleball at Village Square Park in Saugatuck, MI! There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Wayland Union High School
description: Wayland Union High School is a place to play pickleball in Wayland, MI. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net.

name: Yankee Springs Township Park
description: Yankee Springs Township Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Wayland, MI. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.
